name: Talk to Doc Epoch
description: Find Doc Epoch and talk to him to start your machine learning journey.

name: Collect 5 Data Chips
description: Explore the area and collect 5 Data Chips. Then return to Doc Epoch.

name: Talk to Lady Rate
description: Lady Rate will help you understand how to choose the right learning rate for your model.

name: AI Simulator: Learning Rate
description: Use the AI Simulator to correctly calibrate the Learning Rate so that the curve converges.

name: Talk to Master Bias
description: Master Bias will explain to you how bias helps the model make better predictions.

name: AI Simulator: Bias
description: Enter the AI Simulator and use the flexible Bias parameter to align everything properly.

name: Talk to the Overfitting Monster
description: The Overfitting Monster threatens your model! Learn how to avoid overfitting.

name: AI Simulator: The Seduction of Overfitting
description: Train endlessly to memorize the data and be 'perfect on the Training Set', then challenge the invisible Test Set.

name: Return to Doc Epoch
description: Return to Doc to report on generalizing and the true purpose of AI training.

name: Machine Learning Master
description: You have completed all lessons! Now you are ready to train your model.
